name: Popcorn Macaroons
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Popcorn, popped (remove all hard kernels)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put popcorn in blender and chop fine.
2. Combine the popcorn with nuts in a bowl.
3. Beat egg whites until foamy.
4. Gradually add powdered sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Blend in vanilla extract.
6. Mix carefully with the popcorn and nuts.
7. Drop spoonfuls onto a lightly oiled cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated 300 degree F (150 C) oven for 30 to 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
